tests.name: complete local quality gate
tests.summary: Module verification, vet, unit tests, race tests, reproducible cross-architecture builds, kernel smoke, MCP smoke, Python tests, and repository validation passed.

tests.name: PostgreSQL durability and restart gate
tests.summary: The full PostgreSQL integration suite passed in 27.5 seconds and a daemon process restart preserved canonical state.

tests.name: governed MCP acceptance
coverage: propose, inspect, submit, approve, reject, cancel, and resume behavior
stdio command transport with deterministic fake client
idempotent replay with fresh correlation identity
pending decisions cannot be bypassed by generic transitions
every successful and failed tool mutation carries correlated audit evidence

tests.name: authentication and authorization boundary
coverage: the entire /v1 namespace authenticates before routing or parsing
actor identity is derived only from the authenticated principal
missing permissions and cross-scope principals fail before persistence
bearer credentials are never sent to remote plaintext endpoints or redirects

tests.name: migration concurrency and rollback safety
coverage: rollback command barriers prevent concurrent writers

tests.name: official PostgreSQL 18.3 main CI
tests.summary: The protected main workflow passed repository validation and PostgreSQL durability against the digest-pinned PostgreSQL 18.3 service.

tests.name: HTTP boundary hardening pull request CI
tests.summary: The complete hardening change passed before merge in pull request 12.

compatibility_note: PostgreSQL 18.3 is the official supported CI target; PostgreSQL 14.19 passed as an additional local compatibility check.
